'''Moosh''' was one of several members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sleheyron/Legends|Sleheyron]]<ref name="post" /> around [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="date">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> One of Moosh's rivals was [[Suuda]], another Hutt on the planet.<ref name="post" />

==Behind the scenes==
Moosh was originally planned to be part of the<ref name="post" /> [[2003]]<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', but was cut from the final release. This was revealed by one of the game's writers, [[David Gaider]], in a post on the now-defunct ''Knights of the Old Republic'' forums. In this and several other posts, he mentioned Moosh while elaborating on the planet Sleheyron, which received only a mention in the final release. The Hutts on Sleheyron, including Moosh, were intended to give the player's character jobs known as side quests.<ref name="post" />
